creator: vincepoy@gmail.com
text:
I'm running 9.0-CURRENT from February 1, 2010 and even on a 6.0-CURRENT from
November 5, 2004 - it seems diskcheckd works fine but when the system has
gmirror running, disckcheckd seems to run constantly as the HDD light is
solid from the time when disckcheckd is run until system shutdown so not
sure what is causing it on a 2 identical HDD system.  If I stop diskcheckd,
the HDD light immediately goes off.

Cheers,
Vince
Vincent Poy, Ph.D. - Astrophysics
